theme_strategy.archetype_dashboard: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Mode variant for data-density and focus)

typography.pairing_strategy: Soft Utility — Rounded Humanist Sans (Outfit) for friendly commerce, Clean Sans Body (Manrope).

ecommerce_grid.rules: Asymmetry, Visual Tension. Use generous padding (p-8 to p-16). Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8).

dashboard_grid.mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
dashboard_grid.rules: Density, Data Correlation. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Mobile-first grids. Left-align dense content and forms. Optical alignment for icons within buttons.

surface_strategies.ecommerce_header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/70, 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/40).
surface_strategies.ecommerce_cards: Flat Solid surfaces. Warm, organic feeling. Max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). Subtle shadow-sm on hover.
surface_strategies.dashboard_panels: Grid Borders (The Technical Look): border-collapse style layout. Sharp 1px borders (border-[#262626]), no soft shadows. Flat dark backgrounds.

components_and_interactions.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn components heavily customized to match the Light Organic theme (rounded-md, earthy borders) or Dark Swiss theme.
components_and_interactions.buttons: Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:bg-[#1E4219] hover:text-white). No generic Tailwind transitions; use explicit properties.
components_and_interactions.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Chart components for Spectral Resilience visualizations. Must be color-blind-friendly and use high-contrast dark theme accents.
components_and_interactions.motion: Hover states on cards (-translate-y-1). Staggered fade-ins for product lists. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

icons.style: Duotone for E-Commerce, Regular/Bold for Dashboard metrics.

media_and_assets.image_constraints: Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile. Max overlay opacity bg-black/40 with gradients, never flat blankets.

hero_background.description: Top-down view of fresh organic vegetables and carrots. Use for the main e-commerce hero section.

product_1.description: Vibrant mixed fresh vegetables, peppers and tomatoes.

product_3.description: Fresh ripe vegetables and lemon placed on white smooth surface.

cart_empty_state.description: Baskets filled with different fruits and vegetables.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build two distinct visual experiences that route under one application: 1. The Grocery E-Commerce Store (Light Mode, Organic & Earthy). 2. The Spectral Resilience Admin Dashboard (Dark Mode, Swiss High-Contrast).
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all iconography.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import and use 'Outfit' (Headings) and 'Manrope' (Body).
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cart actions) have a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming.
For the E-Commerce side, implement a generous layout (p-8 to p-24) with soft flat cards. Avoid generic Bootstrap columns; use the Tetris Grid pattern.

For the Spectral Resilience Dashboard, build a highly dense, grid-border style dashboard utilizing the dark theme palette. Use Recharts for the Traffic, Latency, Error Rates, and Saturation (SRI) trend charts.
Implement Shadcn UI for structural interactive components (Modals, Selects) but strip Vercel-like styles to match our Organic or Technical archetypes respectively.
